595 CPAP_ADMSN_CD CPAP_ADMSN_CD Therapies: CPAP (Admission) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of admission, the patient was receiving CPAP therapy. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
596 CPAP_DSCHRG_CD CPAP_DSCHRG_CD Therapies: CPAP (Discharge) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the patient was receiving CPAP therapy. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
